notes: v0.16.24 — Bug fix: every CLASS tab was reading account stat_level for the active class and hardcoding LV 1 for the rest, making the level appear to swap on class change. Tab LV chip now reads class_level_for(tile's own class key) so every tab shows its real per-class level all the time. Legacy backfill: first v0.16.24 launch seeds the active class's per-class pool from account totals so chips stop showing LV 1 next to a maxed account. Module library hex tiles now show the stat bonus right under the module name (e.g. '+12% Damage, +20 HP'). Windows only.
